nws_forecast.name: Overnight
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers before 2am, then a chance of rain showers and patchy fog. Cloudy. Low around 43, with temperatures rising to around 52 overnight. Southwest wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers and patchy fog. Cloudy. High near 56, with temperatures falling to around 42 in the afternoon. West wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Rain Showers then Partly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers before 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 29. West wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
